presets.label: Baseline Saved
presets.description: Identity view that preserves the saved Team Calendar EV team-fit and participation assumptions.

presets.label: Depth Constrained
presets.description: Conservative overlay for thinner roster depth: lower fit bounds and softer participation confidence for future race commitments.

presets.label: Best Available
presets.description: Optimistic overlay that assumes the strongest suitable roster is available for the selected program and rewards fit-sensitive races more aggressively.
